entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 9
entries.excerpt: “And God blessed Noah and his sons” (Gen 9:1), that they might grow and multiply, and that the fear of them might be upon all flesh, in the sea and on the dry land. “Only flesh with the life thereof, which is the blood thereof, shall ye not eat” (Gen 9:4) — that is, do not eat of an animal not slain, nor of meat from which the blood has not yet flowed out, in which is the life of the animal.…
